retrieval_only_text_multihop.description: Text-only multi-hop retrieval profile. Does not require VL embedding.
notes: Use explicit model names to avoid ambiguous default slots.
VL embedding is not required for HotpotQA, 2WikiMultiHopQA, or MuSiQue text-only eval.
This profile follows the current cleaned local default for text-only retrieval eval.
The earlier HotpotQA limit=5 real runtime smoke used qwen-plus before this profile alignment.

retrieval_only_text_multihop_qwen_backup.description: Backup text-only multi-hop retrieval profile using qwen-plus as the conversation model.
notes: Keep this as a documented backup profile.
Do not treat it as the default after local model slot cleanup.

cheap_answer_llm_text_multihop.description: Optional answer-generation profile for low-cost text-only evaluation.
notes: Prefer explicit profile binding over default conversation_model.
Use this when answer generation cost matters more than highest answer quality.
